title: Edamame Avocado Toast
description: A savory and protein-rich toast topped with creamy avocado, zesty lemon, edamame, and savory seasonings on hearty whole grain bread
instructions: Add 2 slices of a hearty whole grain bread to the toaster. *
While the bread toasts, add ½ cup (78 g) of edamame beans to a strainer and run them under hot water for about 30 seconds to thaw. Add them to the blender.
Cut an avocado in half and scoop half into the blender.
Slice a lemon in half and squeeze about 1 tbsp (15 g) into the blender. You can also use pre-squeezed juice from a bottle.
Use the pulse feature on your blender to mix up the contents. It will be chunky!
Add the toast to a plate and top with the chunky mixture from the blender. Spread it out on the toast with the back of a spoon or another utensil of choice.
Top with ½ tsp (2 g) of "Everything" seasoning and enjoy!
note: * We think Dave's Killer Bread works perfectly for this meal, but feel free to use any whole grain bread that suits your calorie needs and preferences. Our nutrition info accounts for 5 g of protein per slice.
